question: Provide evidence that multi-factor authentication is enforced for all user accounts with administrative access to production systems
Provide your current IAM password policy showing minimum length
Provide a list of all IAM users with their MFA enrollment status and last login date
Provide evidence that access keys are rotated at least every 90 days
Provide evidence that all S3 buckets storing customer data have encryption at rest enabled
Provide your TLS certificate inventory showing all public-facing endpoints and certificate expiration dates
Provide evidence that data in transit is encrypted using TLS 1.2 or higher
Provide CloudTrail configuration showing that audit logging is enabled for all regions and all API activity
Provide evidence of alerting on suspicious activity or failed authentication attempts
Provide your branch protection policy for main/production branches in source control
Provide evidence of required code review before merging to production
Provide evidence of secret scanning being enabled in your source code repositories
Provide your current MFA enrollment policy from your identity provider
Provide evidence of SSO session timeout settings
Provide evidence of your vulnerability management process including SLA targets for critical findings
Provide a list of open critical and high severity vulnerabilities with their age and remediation status
Provide your information security policy documentation
Provide your incident response plan and evidence of at least one tabletop exercise in the last 12 months
